description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding on back neck, graphic print on the front and contrast colour stitch cover tape inside back neckFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanWarm ironpuma have come up with a fashion-focused T-shirt perfect for girls who like to dress casually without sacrificing style.  Wear this with puma denims and sneakers to demonstrate that Sports Brands have the best fashion sense when it comes to casual dressing.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 32”
